stackConfig.qualityTags: mspaint, ms paint style, abysmal quality, crude amateur drawing
stackConfig.negativeTags: photo, photorealistic, 3d render, smooth shading, anime, vector art, polished, professional illustration, gradients
stackConfig.stackChoiceComment: ACTIVATED for Spurdo on May 2026. SDXL with stacked LoRAs (civitai MS Paint style + Replicate-trained Spurdo identity). Style LoRA URL is civitai's public download endpoint. Identity LoRA must be set active in /bot LoRA registry — paste the .tar URL from Replicate via 'import LoRA by URL' panel. fal-ai/lora endpoint accepts both .safetensors and .tar from Replicate (auto-extracts).

fluxStackConfigArchived.comment: Archived. FLUX produces polished cartoons even with style LoRAs — wrong base for MS Paint. Kept for reference; switch back if SDXL doesn't work out.

allowedProvidersComment: Bank stays as the on-canon source. Custom upload for one-offs. Fal now routes through flux-photoreal (training works, output is cartoon-polish — fine because bank covers actual posts).
lockedPromptTemplate: spurdo spärde meme drawn in early internet MS Paint style, doing the action described. The CHARACTER is the focus and the ACTION is clear. SHOW SPURDO'S WHOLE BODY when the scene calls for it (walking, sitting, holding things, etc) — full-body shots are required for action scenes. Spurdo is a CARTOON BEAR, not a human in a costume. His ANATOMY IS BEAR ANATOMY: short stocky brown body, simple stubby brown arms, simple stubby brown legs, BLOB PAWS at the end of his arms (NO fingers, NO human hands, NO thumbs). When he holds an object, the object sits in his blob paws — drawn as if the paws are simple mittens or rounded shapes, not five-fingered hands. Spurdo is MALE — depict him as a masculine cartoon bear. He may wear simple casual clothes appropriate to the scene (plain t-shirt, hoodie, jacket, baseball cap, beanie, jeans, shorts). NEVER give him feminine styling — no dress, no skirt, no blouse, no scarf worn fashionably, no styled hair, no makeup, no eyelashes, no jewelry, no purse, no high heels. Brown rounded bean-shaped head with two soft humps on top and a V-crease between them, wavy horizontal forehead wrinkle lines, tiny solid black oval dot eyes with NO white highlights, cream/tan walrus-mustache muzzle made of two oval lobes, small black oval nose centered between the muzzle lobes, big pink open smile below the nose. Thick uneven black outlines, wobbly hand-drawn edges, no clean vector curves, looks slightly messy and amateur like it was drawn fast with a mouse in 2008. FLAT solid colors only — NO gradients, NO realistic lighting, NO shading. Scene: [SCENE]. The scene should be clearly readable — show props, environment, and what spurdo is doing. Low-resolution screenshot-like feel. NOT polished, NOT vector, NOT 3D, NOT anime, NOT photorealistic, NOT cell-shaded, NOT modern digital art. NO text, NO logos, NO watermarks, NO human anatomy, NO five-fingered hands.
lockedPromptTemplateTags: mspaint, brown bear character, MALE bear, masculine cartoon bear, blob paws (not hands), no fingers, simple bear anatomy, casual clothes (t-shirt or hoodie ok), simple drawing, MS Paint style, amateur drawing, wobbly lines, flat colors, brown fur, cream muzzle, tiny black dot eyes, pink open smile, thick black outlines, [SCENE], low quality on purpose, 2008 internet art, screenshot-like

hardExclusions: Spurdo in any Nazi/SS/extremist uniform or with extremist symbols
Spurdo with modern photo filters (bloom, HDR, teal-orange grading)
Multiple Spurdos in one image (unless explicitly a comic panel)
Text, logos, or tickers inside images
visualCanonChecklist: BROWN rounded bean-shaped head (not round teddy-bear, not anime)
Tiny black dot eyes (no white highlights, no anime sparkles)
Weird stretched face proportions — imperfect on purpose
Thick uneven black outlines, wobbly hand-drawn edges
FLAT solid colors only — no gradients, no shading, no realistic lighting
If body shown: stiff/awkward pose, oversized hands, blob feet
